What We Do

Complete Electrical Services for Every Job

💡

Lighting Installation

Downlights, pendant lights, wall lights, outdoor lighting, and feature lighting — installed perfectly every time.

🌀

Ceiling Fans

Indoor and outdoor ceiling fan installation for patios, pergolas, bedrooms, and living spaces.

⚡

Switchboard Upgrades

Safety switch installation, power board upgrades, and circuit work to keep your home safe and up to code.

🔧

Fault Finding & Repairs

Tripping safety switches, flickering lights, dead power points — diagnosed and fixed fast, including after hours.

🏢

Commercial Electrical

Signage lighting, commercial fit-outs, and business electrical needs handled professionally.

🌡️

Outdoor & Alfresco

Outdoor infrared heaters, alfresco lighting, and weather-proof electrical work for entertaining areas.
